company_summary: SunGrow Power Supply Co., Ltd. (300274.SZ) is a leading clean-energy equipment provider specializing in PV inverters, energy storage systems (ESS), and emerging solid-state transformer (SST)/AIDC power solutions. The company also has a hydrogen electrolyser business. Its core competitive advantages include high R&D intensity, global brand recognition, and a diversified product portfolio. The as-of date is 2026-07-08, with the most recent financial data being Q1 2026.

segments.products_or_services: Utility-scale and C&I energy storage systems, including PCS, BMS, EMS, and full system integration.
segments.business_model: Project-based system integration with regional pricing and margin variation; value-added services (e.g., grid support, cybersecurity) differentiate from peers.
segments.causal_chain: Demand from renewable integration and grid balancing is robust, with European 3-year CAGR revised to 60%. Supply/capacity is expanding with new factories (Poland 2027H1). Price/volume: ASP under pressure from battery cost declines but regional mix (higher-margin Europe) improves unit profitability. Utilization remains high. Margin: Q1 2026 gross margin ~30%, aided by higher-margin regions and cost passthrough in less competitive markets. Cash flow: working capital drag from contract liabilities (122B) and inventory (44.6% of revenue) but OCF/net profit at 0.53.
counterevidence: Potential FCC ban on inverters with communication functions
Q1 2026 revenue decline -82.55% YoY (partly due to ESS mix shift)
missing_inputs: Exact segment revenue and profit split from filings
Q2 2026 order backlog and delivery schedule
segments.evidence_quote: 2026年一季度，公司储能业务毛利率约为30%

segments.products_or_services: Solar PV inverters, including string and central inverters for residential, commercial, and utility-scale applications.
segments.business_model: Product sales through global distribution channels; R&D-driven product innovation and brand premium.
segments.causal_chain: Demand from solar capacity additions remains steady but growth is decelerating in China. Supply/capacity is ample with industry overcapacity. Price/volume: ASP declining due to commoditization; company differentiates through high efficiency and reliability. Utilization: high but competitive. Margin: gross margin likely ~25-30% (not separately disclosed). Cash flow: steady but working capital tied to project invoicing.
counterevidence: Potential US ban on inverters (though company claims no comms function)
Q1 2026 overall revenue decline suggests PV inverter sales may also be weak
missing_inputs: Exact PV inverter revenue and margin from filings

segments.products_or_services: Solid-state transformers (SST) for data center power distribution, as well as related power electronics for AIDC.
segments.business_model: Platform technology with potential across data centers, EV charging, renewables; currently in commercialization stage.
key_drivers: Competition from traditional transformers and peers
segments.causal_chain: Demand from AIDC power shortages is nascent but growing; orders expected in H2 2026. Supply/capacity: R&D intensive; product launch on July 9, 2026 (10kV SST). Price/volume: premium pricing as first-mover. Utilization: zero initially. Margin: expected high (industry estimates 20% net margin). Cash flow: negative early but R&D cost partly offset by other segments.
counterevidence: Long lead time for customer adoption
missing_inputs: Revenue and profit in near term

known_kpe.evidence: 阳光电源交流更新0701 ... 阳光电源交流更新0701 欧洲市场： • 需求：长时储能趋势明显，原来主流4小时，现在8小时需求增多，已开始出现数据中心配储需求，欧洲储能3年复合增速上修至60%。 • 合规：欧盟融资限制政策涉及项目占欧洲需求约20%，且公司参与该类项目较少。公司波兰工厂预计2027H1建成投产，主要满足欧洲本地化需求，助力获取更多本地订单。 美国市场 • 美国本土逆变器品牌市场份额仅10%左右，构建完善的本土逆变器产业链预计需要5年时间，且存在建设周期长、成本高、供应链配套不足、功率半导体/MLCC等元器件短缺等难点。且之前高补贴一定程度上抑制行业创新，本土产品迭代速度缓慢、效率偏低。 • 合规：阳光电源在北美市场未布局云平台，产品无远程接入能力，始终坚持合规经营，近年未受相关通信安全审查影响。公司已专门成立网络安全实验室，对外提供可视化、可量化、公允的合规演练体系，向第三方机构、客户展示公司在工业控制安全、数据安全、隐私保护等领域的实践，提升客户信任。 • AIDC配储：数据中心配储趋势明确，未来将逐步成为标配，预计2026年下半年订单逐步增多，2027、2028年需求持续上量，欧洲、东南亚等地区的数据中心也有配储需求。 • 传统光储：安全港项目可覆盖至28H1。美国IRA最新细则不再核查电芯产地，仅要求电池仓、PCS、BMS、Pack等大部件的非中国产比例每年提升5%，直至达到70%，阳光可通过本地集成满足相关要求。 SST（固态变压器）业务进展 • 研发进展：7月9日发布可实现交付的SST商业化产品，目前已与欧美及国内大量潜在客户完成沟通，同时35千伏SST产品正在开发中，将推出室内、预制舱、户外等多规格产品，研发进度只会提前不会推后。 • 商业化落地：材料层面：高频变压器所需的纳米晶、非晶等磁材近十年实现快速迭代，材料瓶颈已基本解决；半导体器件层面：宽禁带碳化硅器件崛起，可满足SST高开关频率需求，大幅降低损耗；技术层面：光纤技术、DSP芯片、绝缘技术等近年均有大幅提升，同时数据中心场景对小体积、数字化、可编程、高效率电源的需求迫切，共同推动SST商业化落地。 • 核心竞争优势：公司长期深耕电力电子领域，单SST量产需要至少300人以上的研发团队，连续5年每年至少5亿元的研发投入；应用层面公司将SST定位为电力电子平台型技术，除数据中心场景外，还将拓展至充电桩、PCS、光伏、风电、微电网等场景，摊薄研发成本。竞争对手欧美厂商受供应链效率低、产品迭代速度慢等因素制约，SST业务竞争力偏弱，公司已和部分欧美厂商开展分工合作。

KPE03.evidence: 阳光电源交流更新0701 ... 阳光电源交流更新0701 欧洲市场： • 需求：长时储能趋势明显，原来主流4小时，现在8小时需求增多，已开始出现数据中心配储需求，欧洲储能3年复合增速上修至60%。 • 合规：欧盟融资限制政策涉及项目占欧洲需求约20%，且公司参与该类项目较少。公司波兰工厂预计2027H1建成投产，主要满足欧洲本地化需求，助力获取更多本地订单。 美国市场 • 美国本土逆变器品牌市场份额仅10%左右，构建完善的本土逆变器产业链预计需要5年时间，且存在建设周期长、成本高、供应链配套不足、功率半导体/MLCC等元器件短缺等难点。且之前高补贴一定程度上抑制行业创新，本土产品迭代速度缓慢、效率偏低。 • 合规：阳光电源在北美市场未布局云平台，产品无远程接入能力，始终坚持合规经营，近年未受相关通信安全审查影响。公司已专门成立网络安全实验室，对外提供可视化、可量化、公允的合规演练体系，向第三方机构、客户展示公司在工业控制安全、数据安全、隐私保护等领域的实践，提升客户信任。 • AIDC配储：数据中心配储趋势明确，未来将逐步成为标配，预计2026年下半年订单逐步增多，2027、2028年需求持续上量，欧洲、东南亚等地区的数据中心也有配储需求。 • 传统光储：安全港项目可覆盖至28H1。美国IRA最新细则不再核查电芯产地，仅要求电池仓、PCS、BMS、Pack等大部件的非中国产比例每年提升5%，直至达到70%，阳光可通过本地集成满足相关要求。 SST（固态变压器）业务进展 • 研发进展：7月9日发布可实现交付的SST商业化产品，目前已与欧美及国内大量潜在客户完成沟通，同时35千伏SST产品正在开发中，将推出室内、预制舱、户外等多规格产品，研发进度只会提前不会推后。 • 商业化落地：材料层面：高频变压器所需的纳米晶、非晶等磁材近十年实现快速迭代，材料瓶颈已基本解决；半导体器件层面：宽禁带碳化硅器件崛起，可满足SST高开关频率需求，大幅降低损耗；技术层面：光纤技术、DSP芯片、绝缘技术等近年均有大幅提升，同时数据中心场景对小体积、数字化、可编程、高效率电源的需求迫切，共同推动SST商业化落地。 • 核心竞争优势：公司长期深耕电力电子领域，单SST量产需要至少300人以上的研发团队，连续5年每年至少5亿元的研发投入；应用层面公司将SST定位为电力电子平台型技术，除数据中心场景外，还将拓展至充电桩、PCS、光伏、风电、微电网等场景，摊薄研发成本。竞争对手欧美厂商受供应链效率低、产品迭代速度慢等因素制约，SST业务竞争力偏弱，公司已和部分欧美厂商开展分工合作。

company_model.business_archetype: Clean energy power electronics equipment manufacturer and energy storage system integrator
company_model.value_proposition_and_customers: Provides solar inverters (string and central) and utility-scale battery energy storage systems (BESS) worldwide, along with solid-state transformers for AI data centers. Serves utility companies, commercial & industrial clients, and data center operators.
company_model.revenue_equation: Revenue = Project delivery (GWh) × Average system price (CNY/Wh) + Inverter shipments (GW) × ASP (CNY/W) + emerging SST/AIDC revenue.
company_model.profit_equation: Gross profit = Revenue - battery cost - inverter components - installation costs; Operating profit = Gross profit - R&D - SG&A; Net profit after finance cost (interest & FX) and tax.
company_model.cash_flow_equation: OCF = Net profit + depreciation ± working capital changes; Capex for factory and R&D; FCF = OCF - capex.
company_model.capital_intensity_and_reinvestment: High R&D (¥4.175B in FY2025) and overseas capacity expansion (Poland factory 2027H1). Working capital heavily influenced by contract liabilities (¥122B) and prepayments.
share_count_cross_checks: Could be derived from market cap / share price or total_share from filings, but neither is available in the evidence payload
moat_mechanisms: Brand and bankability with global utility customers
Technology leadership in inverters (high efficiency) and ESS system integration
R&D scale (41.75B CNY in FY2025) and large installed base
Global service network and emerging local manufacturing (Poland plant)
First-mover advantage in SST/AIDC power electronics
moat_to_financial_transmission: Brand enables premium pricing and margin resilience
R&D drives product differentiation and cost reduction
Installed base leads to repeat orders and service revenue
Local manufacturing mitigates tariff risks and strengthens competitive position
structural_risks: US policy risk (38.4% tariff, potential FCC ban on inverters with communication functions)
Intense price competition, especially in China PV inverter market with industry overcapacity
Battery cost volatility and supply chain concentration
Technology risk: SST adoption still unproven, long customer qualification cycles
Working capital strain from large project orders and slow cash conversion (OCF/net profit only 0.53x Q1 2026)
key_unknowns: FY2026 full-year revenue recovery after weak Q1
European ESS market sustainability at 60% CAGR
SST product revenue ramp and margin profile post July 2026 launch
US regulatory outcome for inverters and energy storage
